message:
feat(connector): harden eviction saga compensation, fix rollout timestamps, and expand saga executor

eviction_saga.rs:
- Reorder verify_complete() to run remote cap recheck before L3
  presence check, ensuring capability validation occurs first
- Reorder retire_complete() similarly for consistent error ordering
- Improve error message: "L3 not present and verified" (was just
  "L3 not verified")
- Add early return in compensate() when CompensationAction::None,
  avoiding unnecessary state mutation for phases that need no rollback
- Add ensure_transition_allowed() guard before entering compensation
  to prevent illegal compensation transitions
- Restructure crash_recovery() to early-return for None/terminal
  actions instead of nested conditionals
- Add 4 new tests: verify/retire recheck-fails-before-precondition,
  compensate_pending_is_noop, crash_recovery_from_pending_is_noop

rollout_state.rs:
- Replace manual unix-seconds timestamp with chrono::Utc RFC3339
  formatting for persisted_at field, producing human-readable
  ISO8601 timestamps instead of raw integer strings
- Add persisted_at_uses_rfc3339_and_not_unix_seconds test

saga.rs (+75 lines):
- Add SAG_STEP_FAILED event code for forward step failures
- Expand saga executor with improved step failure handling and
  concurrency limit enforcement

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
